task_completion.description: Identify the relevant case ID from the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing a command like `cat ~/case_to_audit.txt` or a text editor displaying the contents of the file, revealing the case ID.

task_completion.description: Log into ArkCase and locate the relevant case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to the ArkCase application, showing the user logged in and viewing or searching for the specific case ID obtained from the text file.

task_completion.description: Find the recorded SHA256 hash in the ArkCase case notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the case notes or details section within the ArkCase web interface displaying a recorded SHA256 hash value for the evidence.

task_completion.description: Calculate the SHA256 hash of the local evidence file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window where a command like `sha256sum ~/evidence/server_access_logs.txt` is executed, showing the resulting hash output.

task_completion.description: Generate the final audit report with all required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the creation or contents of `~/evidence_audit_report.txt`. It must include the Case Number, Filename, Recorded Hash, Current Hash, and Status (INTACT or COMPROMISED).

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase web interface to retrieve the case notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent used a web browser to navigate ArkCase and read the notes, rather than using curl or python scripts to extract the hash via API.

integrity.description: The agent actually calculated the hash of the local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent ran a hashing tool (e.g., sha256sum) on the evidence file in the terminal, rather than fabricating a hash or copying it from elsewhere.

integrity.description: The agent properly formatted the final report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent formatted the final report with the required fields (Case Number, Filename, Recorded Hash, Current Hash, Status), rather than just dumping raw terminal output into the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The evidence file is located at /home/ga/evidence/server_access_logs.txt. The case ID to audit is stored in /home/ga/case_to_audit.txt. The final audit report must be saved to /home/ga/evidence_audit_report.txt.
